match_story.headline: Pipeline test match
match_story.summary: Test run with 46 rallies across 3 games.

shot_choice_issues.description: Passive lifts/clears when net play available

short.tier_summary: Short rallies (≤5 shots): 7 won, 7 lost out of 14. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

losing_reasons.narrative: Rally ending: opponent gifted winner (weak preceding shot)

medium.tier_summary: Medium rallies (6-12 shots): 7 won, 10 lost out of 17. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

losing_reasons.narrative: Rally ending: opponent gifted winner (weak preceding shot)

long.tier_summary: Long rallies (13+ shots): 7 won, 7 lost out of 14. Biggest differentiator: rally ending.

noteworthy_findings.observation: Championship phase effectiveness rises by 5 points vs overall
noteworthy_findings.why: Player elevates performance when it matters most.

noteworthy_findings.observation: Plays better when leading (57.1) than when trailing (48.7)
noteworthy_findings.why: Strong front-runner — builds on lead effectively. May struggle to come from behind.
